title: Node Exporter Rewrite
description: Complete rewrite of node_exporter.py with helper substitution via @node_helper decorator, known geo_node_group detection, frame splitting into separate files, export options (locations, labels, names), interleaved link emission, and split into a package with separate UI.
definition-of-done: 1. Export panel with checkboxes for each option. 2. Helpers detected and substituted (math_op, vec_math_op, separate_xyz, combine_xyz, compare_op, create_float_curve). 3. Known geo_node_groups detected and emitted as imports. 4. Frame splitting generates folder with main.py + frame_name.py files. 5. Links emitted right after the furthest-down node they reference. 6. Blank lines between node sections. 7. Exporter split into package: utils.py, exporter.py, frame_split.py. 8. UI in separate node_export_ui.py with PropertyGroup.
testing-plan: 1. Export Neck Rails with helpers enabled - verify math_op/separate_xyz substitutions. 2. Export Bi-Rail Loft - verify known group detection skips regeneration. 3. Export Shoulders with split frames - verify folder structure. 4. Validate addon reload via blender-cli validate --group Neck.
todos: DONE : Create @node_helper decorator with NodeHelperMeta dataclass
DONE : Decorate 6 existing helpers with @node_helper metadata
DONE : Refactor generate_group_code into classify + emit two-pass system
DONE : Implement frame splitting with cross-boundary interface analysis
DONE : Build dynamic import headers based on used helpers/groups
DONE : Add ExportOptions dataclass with BoolProperty fields
DONE : Detect known geo_node_groups from registry, exclude tmp/ modules
DONE : Split into package: utils.py, exporter.py, frame_split.py
DONE : Move operator/panel to node_export_ui.py with PropertyGroup
DONE : Interleave link emission after last referenced node
DONE : Add blank lines between node sections
DONE : Fix Blender socket id() instability with (node_name, idx) keys
DONE : Add fallback registry scan via _node_helper_meta function attributes
changes-made: Decorated math_op, vec_math_op, separate_xyz, combine_xyz, compare_op, create_float_curve in node_helpers.py.
Created procedural_human/utils/node_exporter/ package with utils.py, exporter.py, frame_split.py, __init__.py.
Created procedural_human/utils/node_export_ui.py with NodeExportSettings PropertyGroup, operator, and panel.
Updated __init__.py to register/unregister NodeExportSettings and clear node_helper.registry.
Fixed socket identification to use (node_name, socket_index) tuples instead of id() to handle Blender's ephemeral Python wrappers.
Added fallback scan of _node_helper_meta attributes on functions when class-level registry is empty after reload.
